channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump calls MOU 'fair,' denies US will invest 'any money'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Iran and Israel express reservations about deal ahead of expected signing
item.description: Senior U.S. officials say President Trump and Iran's top negotiator have already remotely signed a memorandum of understanding.

item.title: 6.7 magnitude earthquake strikes part of Indonesia
item.description: A 6.7 magnitude earthquake hit central Indonesia's Sulawesi island, injuring at least eight people.

item.title: All eyes on Fed chair Kevin Warsh and his first interest rate decisions
item.description: Since Kevin Warsh was nominated by President Trump in late January to lead the Federal Reserve, questions remain about whether he will raise rates.
